headline: Consumers are still spending, but cracks are starting to show
summary: Shoppers continue to open their pocketbooks, boosting retailers like Walmart, even as inflation jumps to its highest level in three years.

headline: The Home Depot Declares Quarterly Dividend of $2.33
summary: The Home Depot®, the world's largest home improvement retailer, today announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $2.33 per share. The dividend is payable on June 18, 2026, to shareholders of record on the close of business on June 4, 2026. This is the 157th consecutive quarter the company has paid a cash dividend.

headline: IBM Pushes Dow to First Record Since February
summary: The Dow clawed its way back to a new record Thursday with a big boost from IBM.  IBM stock jumped by about 12% on news the tech company is going to potentially receive $1 billion in funding from the U.S. to establish a new quantum foundry subsidiary.  Just before the closing bell, IBM's stock had added 153 points to the Dow.

headline: Where Will Home Depot’s Stock Price Be In 2027?
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) sits at an inflection point. The stock has slid from a September 2025 peak near $422.71 to $302.44, hugging the lower end of its 52-week range as housing affordability and tepid consumer sentiment weigh on big-ticket projects. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Home Depot is $367.94 over the next 12 ... Where Will Home Depot’s Stock Price Be In 2027?

headline: The Home Depot Foundation Invests $5.5M in Disaster Preparedness and Community Resilience Ahead of Storm Season
summary: As hurricane season approaches, The Home Depot Foundation is directly supporting efforts to help communities better prepare for, withstand and recover from natural disasters by investing more than $5.5 million in grants to nonprofit partners. These grants, along with mitigation training for those partners supporting rebuilding efforts, will aid communities through every stage of the disaster response cycle.
